en: Thus says the LORD, "Go, buy a potter's earthenware flask, and take some of the elders of the people and some of the elders of the priests,
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“你去跟陶匠買一個瓦瓶，要帶著幾位人民的長老和年長的祭司，

en: and go out to the Valley of the Son of Hinnom at the entry of the Potsherd Gate, and proclaim there the words that I tell you.
zh: 出到欣嫩子谷，哈珥西 門的入口，在那裡你要宣告我將對你說的話。

en: You shall say, 'Hear the word of the LORD, O kings of Judah and inhabitants of Jerusalem. Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: Behold, I am bringing such disaster upon this place that the ears of everyone who hears of it will tingle.
zh: 你要說：‘猶大列王和耶路撒冷的居民哪！你們要聽耶和華的話。萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：看哪！我必使災禍臨到這地方；凡聽見的，都必耳鳴。

en: Because the people have forsaken me and have profaned this place by making offerings in it to other gods whom neither they nor their fathers nor the kings of Judah have known; and because they have filled this place with the blood of innocents,
zh: 因為他們離棄了我，把這地方玷污了，在這地方向列神燒香。這些神是他們和他們的列祖，以及猶大列王所不認識的；他們又使這地方灑滿無辜人的血。

en: and have built the high places of Baal to burn their sons in the fire as burnt offerings to Baal, which I did not command or decree, nor did it come into my mind-
zh: 他們築了巴力的邱壇，好用火焚燒自己的兒女，作燔祭獻給巴力。這不是我吩咐的，我沒有提說過，也沒有在我心裡想過。

en: therefore, behold, days are coming, declares the LORD, when this place shall no more be called Topheth, or the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, but the Valley of Slaughter.
zh: 因此，看哪！日子快到，這地方必不再稱為陀斐特或欣嫩子谷，而要稱為殺戮谷。’這是耶和華的宣告。

en: And in this place I will make void the plans of Judah and Jerusalem, and will cause their people to fall by the sword before their enemies, and by the hand of those who seek their life. I will give their dead bodies for food to the birds of the air and to the beasts of the earth.
zh: ‘我要在這地方使猶大和耶路撒冷的計謀失敗，也必使他們在仇敵面前倒斃於刀下，死在尋索他們性命的人手中。我要把他們的屍體給空中的飛鳥和地上的野獸作食物。

en: And I will make this city a horror, a thing to be hissed at. Everyone who passes by it will be horrified and will hiss because of all its wounds.
zh: 我要使這城變為荒涼，成為被人嗤笑的對象；每一個經過這裡的，都必因這城所遭受的一切創傷而驚駭，並且嗤笑她。

en: And I will make them eat the flesh of their sons and their daughters, and everyone shall eat the flesh of his neighbor in the siege and in the distress, with which their enemies and those who seek their life afflict them.'
zh: 在他們被圍困和受壓迫之中，就是在仇敵和尋索他們性命的人壓迫他們的時候，我必使他們吞吃自己的兒女的肉，各人也彼此吃對方的肉。’

en: "Then you shall break the flask in the sight of the men who go with you,
zh: “然後你要在跟你同去的人眼前，把那瓶子打碎，

en: and shall say to them, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts: So will I break this people and this city, as one breaks a potter's vessel, so that it can never be mended. Men shall bury in Topheth because there will be no place else to bury.
zh: 並對他們說：‘萬軍之耶和華這樣說：我必照樣打碎這人民和這城，好像人打碎陶匠的瓦器一樣，不能再修補。人必在陀斐特埋葬屍體，甚至無處可埋葬。

en: Thus will I do to this place, declares the LORD, and to its inhabitants, making this city like Topheth.
zh: 我必照樣對待這地方和這地方的居民，使這城像陀斐特一樣。’這是耶和華的宣告。

en: The houses of Jerusalem and the houses of the kings of Judah- all the houses on whose roofs offerings have been offered to all the host of heaven, and drink offerings have been poured out to other gods- shall be defiled like the place of Topheth.'"
zh: ‘耶路撒冷的房屋和猶大列王的宮殿，都要像陀斐特一樣成為不潔；人曾在這一切房屋宮殿的屋頂上，向天上的萬象燒香，向別神澆奠祭。’”

en: Then Jeremiah came from Topheth, where the LORD had sent him to prophesy, and he stood in the court of the LORD's house and said to all the people:
zh: 耶利米從陀斐特，就是從耶和華差遣他去說預言的地方回來，他站在耶和華殿的院中，對眾民說：

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, behold, I am bringing upon this city and upon all its towns all the disaster that I have pronounced against it, because they have stiffened their neck, refusing to hear my words."
zh: “萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：‘看哪！我必使我宣告攻擊這城的一切災禍，臨到這城和她附近的一切城鎮，因為他們硬著頸項，不聽從我的話。’”
